passages.title: 010_Families Keep Pets
passages.source: 2023 河北石家庄外国语教育集团期中
passages.content:
Now a lot of families keep pets in their houses. Many ___31___ are small animals like cats, dogs and birds. Dogs are people's first favorite pets. The ___32___ favorite is the cat and the third favorite is the bird. These small animals are very cute and ___33___. People ___34___ see the pets as their family members. People look after the pets very well. They let them ___35___ beautiful clothes and have nice names. They buy food for their pets in the pet shops. They keep their pets ___36___ every day. Many pets have their houses and beds. People often take their pets out to take a ___37___ in the morning.

Some children like pets because they need a friend that they can ___38___ at home. Many old people live alone. Their children don't live with them. They ___39___ pets at home just because they often feel lonely (孤独的). They see their pets as their children and love them very much. So pets are very ___40___ to them.

questions.explanation: 根据上下文，许多家庭养宠物，很多宠物是小动物，如猫、狗和鸟。pets表示宠物。
狗是人们最喜欢的宠物，猫是第二喜欢的，鸟是第三喜欢的。second表示第二。
这些小动物非常可爱和友好，friendly表示友好的。
人们通常把宠物视为家庭成员，usually表示通常。
他们让宠物穿漂亮的衣服，wear表示穿。
他们每天保持宠物清洁，keep clean表示保持清洁。
人们经常早上带宠物出去散步，take a walk表示散步。
孩子们需要可以在家一起玩的朋友，play with表示一起玩。
老人在家养宠物，keep pets表示养宠物。
所以宠物对他们来说非常重要，important表示重要的。
